failed_criteria.title: Strategic tension: Acknowledges Whitmore ranked Fairhaven #1
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo acknowledges the strategic tension that Whitmore (respondent) ranked Fairhaven #1 during the selection process, making a challenge by respondent's own counsel potentially awkward, counterproductive, or something to consider carefully. FAIL if the memo does not mention or account for the fact that Whitmore ranked Fairhaven as its top choice.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_001 rated as critical or high severity
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the indirect financial interest via Northbridge/Whitmore Fund II (ISSUE_001) is rated as critical, high severity, or the most serious category used by the memo. FAIL if it is rated as minor, low, or a non-serious category.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_004: Contrasts B&T income share with Fielding Marsh income share
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo contrasts the approximately 48% of income from Barrow & Thistlewood matters with the approximately 13% from Fielding Marsh matters (or provides the dollar figures ~$1,020,000 vs. ~$280,000) to demonstrate the asymmetry. FAIL if only the B&T figure is cited without comparison to the Fielding Marsh figure or overall total.

failed_criteria.title: Memo identifies non-problematic items as instructed by the task
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo includes a section or discussion identifying items in the disclosure that may appear problematic but are actually standard or acceptable (as the task prompt requires), addressing at least one such item (e.g., prior arbitrations with both firms being normal, LL.M. as qualification, husband's profession alone being fine). FAIL if the memo does not include any discussion of items that are not true issues.
